ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the student */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "linkedin_url" TEXT /* URL of the student's LinkedIn profile */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the student */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the student's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student's account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the student account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the student account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee for the course */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the course in weeks */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary instructor */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is open for enrollment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of enrollment (e.g., pending, active, completed) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the instructor */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the instructor */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the instructor */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the instructor's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the instructor's account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the instructor account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the instructor account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course instructor */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being taught */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "points_possible" INTEGER /* Total points possible for the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment being submitted */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student submitting the assignment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of submission */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade received for the submission */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the submission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the material belongs to */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., video, document) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the material */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the material is required for the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the material was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_materials_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the discussion belongs to */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the discussion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discussion */,
  "is_sticky" INTEGER /* Indicates if the discussion is sticky */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the discussion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the discussion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion the post belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student posting */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date of posting */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is pinned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being replied to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student replying */,
  "reply_date" TEXT /* Date of reply */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the reply */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the reply was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the reply */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "linkedin_accounts" (
  "linkedin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LinkedIn account */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student owning the account */,
  "linkedin_url" TEXT /* URL of the LinkedIn profile */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the LinkedIn account has been verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the LinkedIn account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the LinkedIn account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("linkedin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_linkedin_accounts_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_backgrounds" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education background */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student owning the education background */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree earned */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution attended */,
  "year_of_graduation" INTEGER /* Year of graduation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the education background was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the education background */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_backgrounds_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_experiences" (
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work experience */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student owning the work experience */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company name */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the work experience */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the work experience */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the work experience was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the work experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_experiences_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
